name: plantuml-architect
description: Create draft-review-approve PlantUML/UML architecture diagrams before coding web applications.

interface.shortDescription: Draft, review, approve, then render UML diagrams.
interface.longDescription: PlantUML Architect gives Codex a draft-review-approve workflow for UML use case, sequence, class, activity, component, and deployment diagrams. It recognizes English and Vietnamese diagram requests such as PlantUML, UML, vẽ UML, sơ đồ use case, sơ đồ lớp, bấm duyệt, and thiết kế kiến trúc. It creates PlantUML files under docs/architecture, waits for user approval before final SVG/PNG rendering, and can create a local Codex HTML editor for drag-and-drop diagram editing without diagrams.net or remote services.
interface.defaultPrompt: Draft the architecture first with PlantUML diagrams, wait for approval, then render final diagrams and implement the web application.
